items.text: NOTICE: The east elevator in Franklin Science Library will be out of service from March 3 to March 7 for repairs. Students may use the west elevator or the stairs. A temporary two-dollar delivery fee applies for retrieving reserved books from upper floors.

questions.stem: According to the notice, when will the east elevator be unavailable?

options.A: From the third to the seventh of March
options.B: From the first to the fifth of March
options.C: From the fifth to the ninth of March
options.D: From the eighth to the tenth of March

questions.explanation: The notice states the east elevator will be out of service from March 3 to March 7, restated here as the third to the seventh of March.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what must students pay to have reserved books brought down?
questions.explanation: The notice mentions a temporary two-dollar delivery fee for retrieving reserved books from upper floors.

items.text: SPRING 5K FUN RUN! Join us Saturday, April 12, at 8:00 AM on the North Green. Registration is five dollars and includes a T-shirt. All fitness levels welcome. Sign up at the Recreation Center by April 10. Proceeds support the campus food pantry.

questions.stem: According to the flyer, what does the registration cost include?

options.C: Eight dollars with a finisher medal
options.D: Ten dollars with a water bottle

questions.explanation: The flyer says registration is five dollars and includes a T-shirt.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about a student who wants to join but has never trained for a race?

options.B: That student must hire a coach
options.C: That student should skip the event
options.D: That student needs a medical waiver

questions.explanation: The flyer notes that all fitness levels are welcome, implying an untrained student may still take part.
